goal: Load existing facial keypoint annotations associated with the input image.
requirements: Do not run MediaPipe, dlib, or any other landmark detector in the MVP.
Use the keypoints already provided by the dataset annotation files.
Support common annotation formats such as JSON, CSV, TXT, MAT, or COCO-style keypoint annotations when possible.
Convert all keypoints into image coordinate space.
Normalize annotation format into a unified internal schema.
Extract semantic anchor groups from dataset keypoint indices.

output.semantic_anchors: Dictionary mapping semantic region names to keypoint IDs and coordinates.
